content: Use this option if you want to get all data contained in the space as a file.

comment.text: Use this option to download all data contained within a space as a file. This setting is typically found on backup and restore options in a space management interface.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'space' (referring to the ONLYOFFICE DocSpace) was translated as 'الاستضافة' (hosting), which changes the technical meaning of the feature context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: استخدم هذا الخيار إذا كنت تريد الحصول على جميع البيانات الموجودة في المساحة كملف.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation uses 'на портала' (on the portal) instead of 'в пространството' (in the space). This changes the technical context from a specific 'space' to the entire 'portal'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Използвайте тази опция, ако искате да получите всички данни, съдържащи се в пространството, като файл.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Finnish translation uses 'sivuston' (website) instead of 'tilan' (space), which changes the technical context from a 'space' to a 'website'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Käytä tätä vaihtoehtoa, jos haluat ladata kaiken tilassa olevan tiedon tiedostona.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian translation uses 'կայքէջում' (on the website/webpage) instead of 'space' (the technical entity in ONLYOFFICE DocSpace). This changes the context from a workspace/space to a website.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Օգտագործեք այս տարբերակը, եթե ցանկանում եք ստանալ տարածքում պարունակվող բոլոր տվյալները որպես ֆայլ:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'space' (referring to a digital workspace/container) is translated as 'ປະຕູ' (door), which is contextually incorrect and changes the meaning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ໃຊ້ທາງເລືອກນີ້ຖ້າທ່ານຕ້ອງການເອົາຂໍ້ມູນທັງຫມົດທີ່ມີຢູ່ໃນສະເປດເປັນໄຟລ໌.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation uses 'ka' (that) instead of 'ja' (if), which changes the logical structure of the sentence from a conditional statement to a broken clause. Additionally, it translates 'space' as 'portāla' (portal), which is inaccurate given the context of 'space' in DocSpace.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Izmantojiet šo iespēju, ja vēlaties iegūt visus telpā saturētos datus faila veidā.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation uses 'na portalu' (on the portal) instead of 'w przestrzeni' (in the space), which changes the technical context of the feature.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Użyj tej opcji, jeśli chcesz pobrać wszystkie dane zawarte w przestrzeni jako plik.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation uses 'портале' (portal) instead of 'space' (пространство), which changes the technical context of the feature.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Используйте эту опцию, если Вы хотите получить все данные, содержащиеся в пространстве, в виде файла.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Slovak translation says 'a file with all data' (súbor všetkými údajmi) instead of 'all data as a file' (všetky údaje ako súbor). The current phrasing is grammatically awkward and implies the file is composed of data in a way that doesn't match the English intent of downloading the data content into a file format.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Túto možnosť použite, ak chcete získať všetky údaje obsiahnuté v priestore ako súbor.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation uses 'порталі' (portal) instead of 'space' (просторі), which changes the technical context of the feature.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Використовуйте цю опцію, якщо ви хочете отримати всі дані, що містяться у просторі, як файл.
